claim.content: The kinetic-energy renormalization factor q obtained from the Gutzwiller variational state is interpreted in the Fermi-liquid sense via the relation 1/q = m^{*}/m, where m^{*} denotes the Fermi-liquid quasiparticle effective mass and m denotes the bare electron mass; this identification is used to translate reductions in q into quasiparticle mass enhancement.
